meta.description: Pre-flight assessment of implementation blockers and unknowns for a given item

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_3b3bd465_658a_4a27_bda9_4cba0bc67a62" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "subject" UUID,
    "assessed_by" TEXT,
    "readiness_score" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_3b3bd465_658a_4a27_bda9_4cba0bc67a62" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_3b3bd465658a4a27_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_3b3bd465658a4a27_subject" FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES items(id)
)
